homework.title: Colors and Shapes Recognition
homework.description: Identify and color different shapes. Circle the red objects and draw a triangle.

homework.title: Number Counting 1-20
homework.description: Practice counting from 1 to 20. Write the numbers and draw corresponding objects.

homework.title: My Family Tree
homework.description: Draw your family members and write their names. Tell us about each person.

homework.title: Letter Tracing A-F
homework.description: Practice writing uppercase and lowercase letters A through F. Include pictures for each letter.

homework.title: Weather Chart
homework.description: Observe and record the weather for one week. Draw pictures of sunny, cloudy, and rainy days.

homework.title: Simple Addition Practice
homework.description: Solve addition problems using numbers 1-10. Use objects or drawings to help you count.

homework.title: Story Retelling
homework.description: Read a favorite story and draw 4 pictures showing what happened. Write one sentence for each picture.

homework.title: Animal Habitats
homework.description: Match animals to their homes. Draw where different animals live and explain why.

homework.title: Math Practice
homework.description: Complete pages 15-20 in the math workbook

homework.title: Reading Assignment
homework.description: Read chapter 3 of the story book

homework.title: Science Project
homework.description: Draw and label parts of a plant

results.feedback: Excellent work! Your family tree is very detailed and creative.
